title: Windows Defense Evasion Score (Combined Methods)
description: Calculates a defense evasion risk score per host by counting distinct evasion indicators: event log clearing, AMSI bypass, firewall modification, UAC bypass, process hollowing. Hosts exhibiting multiple evasion techniques indicate sophisticated attackers actively disabling security controls. Uses combined scoring (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Combined Methods - risk scoring).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Command Line' like '*wevtutil*cl*') or ('Command Line' like '*Clear-EventLog*') or ('Command Line' like '*AmsiUtils*') or ('Command Line' like '*amsiInitFailed*') or ('Command Line' like '*netsh*firewall*') or ('Command Line' like '*advfirewall*set*off*') or ('Command Line' like '*fodhelper*') or ('Command Line' like '*eventvwr*') or ('Command Line' like '*NtUnmapViewOfSection*') or ('Command Line' like '*CREATE_SUSPENDED*')) | stats count as evasion_events, distinctcount('Command Line') as unique_techniques by 'Host Name' | where unique_techniques > 1 | sort -unique_techniques
